pundit.name: Eric Wynalda
pundit.take: **If these managers drafted as poorly as Gayden, they'd think DR Congo is a contender — yet again, they're wrong.** England against DR Congo in Atlanta? Please. "The Backpass Assassin," aka Gayden, is looking more like the "Own Goal Obliterator" with his laughable choices. England should dominate this matchup, and Gunner, our current leader, is set to make another mockery of Gayden's so-called "strategy." I mean, did Gayden think he was picking pubs for a bar crawl instead of teams for a World Cup? England will cruise. As for Devin, the "Ghost Pepper" picked two teams playing each other. Talk about a lack of foresight — it's all sizzle, no steak. The USA against Bosnia in Seattle? Devin should have stuck with his one good pick, but now he’s stuck cannibalizing his own points. I'll give him credit for picking Spain, but the rest of his draft looks like he threw darts while blindfolded. Expect the USA to snag the win. So while Devin and Gayden bumble around the bottom of the standings, Gunner — with his smart choices — continues to show why he's miles ahead in this pool.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner's France Clinches Victory, Secures Top Spot in Standings
pundit_takes.subtitle: Critics say his strategy of relying on French cuisine paid off.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden's England Set to Face DR Congo in Atlanta
pundit_takes.subtitle: Optimists claim Atlanta heat may inspire strategic backpasses.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin's USA and Bosnia Poised for Friendly Fire in Seattle
pundit_takes.subtitle: Local fans excited for Devin's tactical masterclass against himself.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe's Mexico Outsmarts Ecuador, Gains Ground with Decisive Win
pundit_takes.subtitle: Prodigy manager reportedly used three highlighters and a magic 8-ball.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner's 56% win chance looks like Vegas odds made by a blindfolded monkey.
Rafe: Drafting fantasies, living nightmares with zero qualified teams initially. Nice job, rookie.
Gunner obliterated Devin by 8 points; that's not rivalry, that’s a public shaming.
Sim tried to crown Gunner, but little Rafe's chaos made a mockery of models.
